title: maxo plus Bathroom Cleaner
description: Removes tough stains, soap scum, and water marks while leaving bathrooms sparkling clean.

title: Maxo Plus Dishwash
description: Effective dish wash gel that cuts through tough grease and food residue, leaving utensils sparkling clean and fresh.

title: Floor cleaner
description: Premium floor cleaner with long-lasting fragrance. Removes dirt, stains, and germs while keeping floors fresh and hygienic.

title: Hand wash
description: Gentle hand wash that effectively removes germs and bacteria while keeping hands soft, clean, and refreshed.

title: Phenyl
description: Strong disinfectant phenyl cleaner designed to clean, sanitize, and leave floors fresh with a pleasant fragrance.

title: Toilet cleaner
description: Powerful toilet cleaner that removes stubborn stains, kills germs, and keeps toilets fresh and hygienic.
